string.text: ...I've finally met you, Commander. You're exactly as I imagined.
You must be "Phaetusa"? Nice to meet you!
I got to see you today, Commander. I'm so happy!
Sweeper, you're not angry at me anymore right? Even after what happened with Sangvis Ferri...
That Phaetusa... She has such a big mouth, telling you everything... Wh-what are you looking at?! I did say I don't hate you, so what? Don't get cocky!
Can you come with me, Phaetusa?
The thought of being guided by you, Commander, gets me strangely excited... I haven't felt this way in a long time. Let me experience once more that human wisdom and resilience...
Okay Sweeper, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
I wouldn't say I completely trust you just yet, but... I'll try to put in more of an effort. What's with that look? This is the absolute best I can do right now!
